title: conyza saxatilis
intro: Conyza saxatilis, also known as fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Conyza saxatilis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Conyza saxatilis is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used in traditional medicine.
